ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the well */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator of the well */,
  "drilling_year" INTEGER /* Year the well was drilled */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the well location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the well location */,
  "depth" REAL /* Total depth of the well */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the well (e.g., active, inactive, decommissioned) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "operator_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formations" (
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation */,
  "formation_name" TEXT /* Name of the formation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the formation (e.g., marine, non-marine) */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the formation (e.g., Jurassic, Cretaceous) */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Average thickness of the formation */,
  "lithology" TEXT /* Lithological description of the formation */,
  "hydrocarbon_potential" TEXT /* Potential for hydrocarbons (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facies" (
  "facies_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facies */,
  "facies_name" TEXT /* Name of the facies */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facies */,
  "porosity_min" REAL /* Minimum porosity value for the facies */,
  "porosity_max" REAL /* Maximum porosity value for the facies */,
  "resistivity_min" REAL /* Minimum resistivity value for the facies */,
  "resistivity_max" REAL /* Maximum resistivity value for the facies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well id */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which data was recorded */,
  "gamma_ray" REAL /* Gamma Ray measurement */,
  "resistivity" REAL /* Resistivity measurement */,
  "porosity" REAL /* Porosity measurement */,
  "facies_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facies classified at this depth */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the depth */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the depth */,
  "saturation" REAL /* Saturation level (e.g., water, oil) */,
  "tool_used" TEXT /* Tool used for logging */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag (e.g., good, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_logs_facies_id FOREIGN KEY ("facies_id") REFERENCES facies ("facies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depth_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each depth range */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the formation id */,
  "depth_min" REAL /* Minimum depth of the formation */,
  "depth_max" REAL /* Maximum depth of the formation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the depth range */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_depth_ranges_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the log id */,
  "reading_type" TEXT /* Type of reading (e.g., GR, PHIND) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reading was taken */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reading */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the reading (e.g., good, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES well_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., geoscientist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the log */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the log */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES well_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the log id */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata field */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata field */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., field, laboratory) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES well_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facies_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "facies_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facies id */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter used for classification */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facies_settings_facies_id FOREIGN KEY ("facies_id") REFERENCES facies ("facies_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formation_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the formation id */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., permeability, density) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formation_properties_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the log id */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "quality_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES well_logs ("log_id")
)
